response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of strong full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript/Node.js and customer-facing technical leadership, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited explicit production GenAI experience — no concrete evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. Python is also notably absent from the skills list, which is a gap for a Staff GenAI role. Worth a screening call to probe the depth of recent AI work.
strengths: 15+ years senior/staff engineering with strong TypeScript and Node.js delivery
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Proven technical leadership: workshops, mentoring, talks, and customer-facing delivery
concerns: No Python listed in skills — a core required language for the role
No explicit experience with vector DBs, RAG, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz; no GCP/Azure or deep AI-on-cloud architecture shown

key_factors.factor: Strong senior IC track record and TypeScript expertise
Python not listed as a core skill
